name: Washita State Bank
description_short: Community bank in Burns Flat, Oklahoma offering checking, savings, CDs, and agricultural loans with competitive rates and mobile banking access.
description_long:
Washita State Bank is a traditional community bank located in Burns Flat, Oklahoma, serving local customers through a single physical location. The bank has been positioned as a relationship-based institution focused on agricultural lending and personal banking services, with a toll-free number (1-800-687-3149) suggesting regional reach beyond just the immediate community. Their online presence includes a functional website with rate information and educational content about financial security. The bank emphasizes personal service and community connection in their messaging, positioning themselves as accessible and willing to work with customers on various financial goals.

Washita State Bank offers a range of standard banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (currently advertising 6-month CDs at 3.95% APY), and loan products with particular emphasis on agricultural lending. They provide online and mobile banking access through their mobile app, allowing customers to manage accounts remotely. The bank maintains standard banking infrastructure including 24-hour ATMs, night depositories, and customer service via phone. Additional offerings include fraud prevention education and elder financial abuse awareness information.

The bank distinguishes itself primarily through its focus on agricultural lending and local community presence. They emphasize agricultural loans as a core product offering, which is relatively specialized compared to national banks. Their messaging about "making dreams a reality" and being "here for the community" reflects a community bank positioning. The bank provides fraud prevention and financial security education on their website, suggesting customer protection as a value-add. Competitive rates on deposit products (3.95% on 6-month CDs) indicate they're monitoring market rates actively.

Washita State Bank is a legitimate community banking option for customers in their service area seeking personalized service and local decision-making. However, as a single-location bank, they lack the convenience and breadth of services available through larger regional or national banks. Their agricultural lending focus may mean less specialization in other loan types. The bank's digital presence is functional but basic compared to larger competitors offering more advanced fintech features. Customers should contact them directly regarding specific loan terms, qualifications, and rates, as detailed product information is limited on their website.
pros: Competitive CD rates at 3.95% APY on 6-month certificates as of the website date
Specialized agricultural lending program positioning them for farm and rural customers
Mobile app available for account access on-the-go
24-hour ATM access for convenient withdrawal and deposits
Toll-free customer service line (1-800-687-3149) for regional accessibility
Educational resources on fraud prevention and elder financial abuse protection
Online banking portal with secure messaging for account inquiries
cons: Single physical location in Burns Flat, Oklahoma limits branch access and convenience
Limited detailed product information on website regarding loan terms, rates, and eligibility
Basic digital banking infrastructure compared to larger regional or national banks
No mention of FDIC insurance or detailed account protection policies on website
Agricultural lending focus may mean limited product depth in other loan categories
best_for: Agricultural borrowers and farmers seeking specialized lending in Oklahoma
Burns Flat and surrounding rural community residents wanting local banking relationships
Depositors seeking competitive CD rates with personalized service
Customers preferring community bank decision-making over corporate policies
diagnosis: Washita State Bank is best for rural Oklahoma customers and agricultural borrowers seeking a community bank with personalized service and competitive deposit rates. The main caveat is their single-location presence and limited digital capabilities compared to larger banks, making them less convenient for customers requiring multi-location access or advanced fintech features.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
